answer: Tara was grateful to her boss.

choices.label: A
choices.text: Tara was grateful to her boss.

label: A
story: Tara was sick in bed all week. She missed work due to a really bad flu. Tara got a surprise visit from her boss in the evening. Her boss sent her cookies and a get-well card.
